highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
UG Diploma Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.
After 10th Diploma Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology has been rated 3.8 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 291 students were admitted at Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology and 189 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 189 students 118 were placed with median salary of INR 420000 and 40 students opted for higher studies. A total of 346 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technologyand 231 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 231 students 130 were placed with median salary of INR 450000 and 46 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 130 students were admitted at Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology and 130 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 130 students 100 were placed with median salary of INR 530000 and 3 students opted for higher studies. A total of 130 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technologyand 130 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 130 students 100 were placed with median salary of INR 500000 and 4 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.answer: A:    Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology has been rated 3.4 on placements.
faqs.question: Does Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology programmes is around INR 70,000 to 2,05,600.

faqs.answer: A:    Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 8 UG and 6 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology has specializations such as UG Diploma specializations in Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: 85 percent of the students are placed in college. The highest package is 30 LPA, the average package is 13 LPA, and the lowest package is 8 LPA. The percentage of students who get internships from the college in final year has internships for six months.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities and infrastructure are available in the course. Wi-Fi works well in the hostel and college. The library also has a very good book to enter the ID card screens. The classroom and labs are also checked. The hostel food is average. Medical, facilities, sports, and many other things are available in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college in our surroundings.

review_content.Placements: 60 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 24 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA. The average package is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, JSW Steel, and Wipro. Nearly 80 percent of students got internships from our course. Top roles offered are manager, data analyst, and HR manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in our department are good. We have different labs for each department and different subjects. The library is good. The facilities in our hostel are good. We have different mess opportunities and canteens available in our college. We have sports and games every day evening.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The review is written based on what I see in my college.

review_content.Placements: From the 7th semester, students are eligible to get campus placements here. Many companies like Infosys, Wipro, etc., visit the college to give placements. Almost 80% of students will get the job. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. The lowest salarypackage offered is 3 LPA. My plan is if I get the best job that reaches my expectations then I will move accordingly.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides a very good infrastructure, neatness in classes and washrooms. The hostel facility is available and it also has good infrastructure and neatness. It has neat rooms and washrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The College Life at Sree Vahini Institution of Science and Technology.

review_content.Placements: In my college, there are 260 members, and the highest package is 10 Lakhs per annum. The recruiting companies are IBM, TCS, Infosys, and etc. All the students will get internships, and roles offered in my course in companies like IBM, TCS, Infosys, which recruit us for internships and placements as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are good, and each faculty is very experienced and very encouraging about studies. If you adjust to the food in the hostel, it is very nice. The infrastructure of the college, labs, and hostel are nice. My college has all facilities like a gym, labs, canteen, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The teaching faculty is too good.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 12 lacs per annum. The lowest salary package offered is 3 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are Wipro and Infosys. Around 70% of students got placed every year in my college. Around 60% of students got internships in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The classrooms are very big, with comfortable benches. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The library is available. Wi-Fi is enabled with high-speed internet. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Yes I would highly recommend to anyone who are willing to join and it's a great place to learn.

review_content.Placements: Yes, more than 60% were placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.6 LPA. Top companies like HCL, Capgemini, and IBM, etc., participated. More than 60% got internships. The top roles in my college placements are Data Analyst, Software Engineer, and Web Developer, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, the faculty is good and has good knowledge of the subjects. They are very interactive with students. There are very good hostel facilities and two big playgrounds as well. I’m also enjoying all the days because the faculty is very friendly, both in and outside of the classes.

For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 36410 to 110361, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 36410.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities and infrastructure are available in the course. Wi-Fi works well in the hostel and college. The library also has a very good book to enter the ID card screens. The classroom and labs are also checked. The hostel food is average. Medical, facilities, sports, and many other things are available in college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in our surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our department are good. We have different labs for each department and different subjects. The library is good. The facilities in our hostel are good. We have different mess opportunities and canteens available in our college. We have sports and games every day evening.

reviews.review_heading: The review is written based on what I see in my college.
reviews.review_text: It provides a very good infrastructure, neatness in classes and washrooms. The hostel facility is available and it also has good infrastructure and neatness. It has neat rooms and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The College Life at Sree Vahini Institution of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good, and each faculty is very experienced and very encouraging about studies. If you adjust to the food in the hostel, it is very nice. The infrastructure of the college, labs, and hostel are nice. My college has all facilities like a gym, labs, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching faculty is too good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The classrooms are very big, with comfortable benches. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The library is available. Wi-Fi is enabled with high-speed internet. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Yes I would highly recommend to anyone who are willing to join and it's a great place to learn.
reviews.review_text: Yes, the faculty is good and has good knowledge of the subjects. They are very interactive with students. There are very good hostel facilities and two big playgrounds as well. I’m also enjoying all the days because the faculty is very friendly, both in and outside of the classes.

reviews.review_heading: It was a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and infrastructure of the college were very good. Mostly, the college was covered with greenery, making it a very peaceful place. The college provides girls' and boys' hostels as well. The quality of food was good, with mess and canteen facilities also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sree Vahini Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities available in the college. Good infrastructure and labs are available in the college, and a library is also available. The hostel facility was good, and they were serving healthy food to students. The environment in the college was great; a lot of trees were planted. Great atmospheric conditions are there in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Somehow satisfied with the college. We need to improve the infrastructure and drainage system.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the college is somehow spacious. But the infrastructure is also not up to par. They don't provide any kind of WiFi to students. They have well-maintained and spacious labs that are used for coding or related software purposes. Classrooms are also well maintained. They also have a central library.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. All classrooms and labs are very spacious. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel does not provide drinking water. The food served in the hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough. Hostels are good and the food served in our hostel is good. Wi-Fi is also available. In the hostel, sports activities are conducted occasionally.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but fees and condonation fines are high on campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not bad. Labs are good, but less time was provided for labs to do work. If you want to join, it's better to get a laptop on your own. The hostel food is bad. It's better to stay in rented rooms. Transportation facilities are available to all for a fee by distance.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, it is an average experience but faculty is good if they improve, it will be better.
reviews.review_text: There are decent facilities available in our college compared with other colleges. There is Wi-Fi available for only faculty not for students. The classrooms and library are good. The hostel is good and the food available in the mess is good. There are not much medical and sports facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good studies, teachers, and placements are improved compared to 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good studies and faculty members. It has good labs and infrastructure. The environment of the classrooms is good and contains projectors and healthy education. The library has a Wi-Fi facility also. In the hostel, there are 2 wardens who maintain very well. The college provides a hospital facility for free and a gym facility. In the hostel, the mess provides good food. Sometimes, it is not tasty.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for the studies, and placements are good as compared to the previous year.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a good environment. It has excellent laboratories and a Wi-Fi facility is also available. The library which contains a lot of department books and general knowledge books and also UPSC preparation books are also available. The hostel is very comfortable and sometimes water problems are there. The warden is moved with students and he is very friendly. Some days in the month the food is not prepared well.

answer.text: Selvam College of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Baba Mast Nath Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Shri Baba Mast Nath Engineering College.

content.Placements: It is hard to get placed from here. If you are lucky, then any company can select you, and it would be any local company. Don't expect much from here, and mostly, you will get placed through off-campus placements as per your skills. As it is not a highly reputed college, you have to be skilful to compete in the market.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, so I have no idea about hostels. But the boy's hostel building is very old, while the girl's hostel building is new. Other necessary infrastructural facilities are also available, but we don't get a chance to go to labs. Labs are available but not in very good conditions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, this college is not good.

content.Placements: There are no campus placements. I am in the 3rd of my B.Tech, but I haven't seen any company visiting this college for placements. There are no chances of industrial training, onsite projects or industrial tours. The college doesn't pass any notifications regarding placements or interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark. Computer science engineering students don't need many facilities. Hence, computer science can be a good choice in this college if you want to take admission here. The other branches have nearly no infrastructure. Labs are empty, and the lab assistants are clueless about the machines and tools.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you not to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. There is a placement cell in the college, but it is not efficient. In the past 5-6 years, not even a single student get placed even in the local companies. It is just like a dream for the students to get placed in reputed companies. Students work hard to get internships, and the college doesn't even provide any internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is worse than government schools. There are no proper laboratories, medical facilities, proper drinking water and even washrooms. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facilities. The college provides the Wi-Fi facility only for the staff members, and also there are problems in connecting the Wi-Fi. They doesn't take any measures for uninterrupted electricity supply even in the summer season. The electrical equipment does not work properly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It's better to sit at home rather than getting admission in this college.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placements or guidance for the students. From the past 3-4 years, no one got placement in the college. No company visited our college for placements. Even local companies didn't visit our college for any drive. We have a placement cell, but it is not useful.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the worst infrastructure facilities. It lacks in every aspect. It does not have laboratories. There is no proper education provided by the college. Our college does not provide even the basic facilities like drinking water, electricity, washrooms, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and the location is also good. The best thing is it has math.

content.Placements: The worse college in terms of placement. There are no core companies for the core students. The placements officer says to go for the companies, and if not, then they won't bring core as they are not here to provide the job. You are given money for the degree, but not for the job. If you want a job from this college, you will only get BPO jobs or IT related jobs. The college life is just awesome, and the best four years of anyone's life.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. The classrooms are okay, there are some classes where they have benches like schools whereas there are some which have an elevated platform like in other colleges. The regular classrooms generally do not give the pleasure of reading and studying. The infrastructure is maintained well, and the labs are well maintained. The Wi-Fi is available all over the campus, but there are some spots on the campus where the Wi-Fi strength is weak and doesn't work well. The sports facilities are well available for the students.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for professional courses with decent placement support. Vibrant campus life.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% of eligible students got placed. The highest package from my batch is 27 LPA. The highest package from college is 49 LPA. Top roles offered for graduates from this course include business analyst, software developer, consultant, and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-stocked library, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel rooms are generally decent, with two students per room, and include basic facilities like a bed, table, and almirah. The college has a doctor's clinic on campus for basic medical aid. For sports, there are facilities for outdoor games like cricket and volleyball.

review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very beautiful in this college. Hostel facilities are average. Wi-Fi does not work in hostel. overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of an ECE engineer?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

review_summary.college_name: Maharana Institute of Professional Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Maharana Institute of Professional Studies.

content.Placements: Placements are good in MPGI. 70% of students get placed in different companies. Infosys is the top recruiting company.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure. There are big grounds and the best canteen. The mess is also very good, and they give high priority to hygiene.
content.Faculty: Faculty is very supportive and always helps weak students to rise. Sometimes the exams are scheduled in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Quite good infrastructure and supportive faculty with a good scope of better placements.

content.Placements: Overall, the placements are going quite well with a good percentage. The highest package till now is about 12 LPA in the B.Tech course. Top recruiting companies till now are Razorpay, Juspay. Only a few students have been placed till now, as we are at the start of the final year. Top roles offered as frontend development or software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are not that much up to date because sometimes they become of low range, which affects our placement drive assessment and virtual interviews. The facilities in other departments are also not that good because they never consider the students urgent matters.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for professional courses with decent placement support. Vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% of eligible students got placed. The highest package from my batch is 27 LPA. The highest package from college is 49 LPA. Top roles offered for graduates from this course include business analyst, software developer, consultant, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-stocked library, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel rooms are generally decent, with two students per room, and include basic facilities like a bed, table, and almirah. The college has a doctor's clinic on campus for basic medical aid. For sports, there are facilities for outdoor games like cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college is one of the popular colleges of Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

content.Placements: 99% of students are placed. The highest package given to Shruti Omer is 50 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Wipro, TCS, and Microsoft. BBA students are mostly placed at TCS and Amazon. This college is very much suitable for the students. This college provides good quality education.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very beautiful in this college. Hostel facilities are average. Wi-Fi does not work in hostel. For BBA students labs are not provided as much as we need. Hostel needs a lot of improvement. No proper management in hostel. We get sick after eating the food from our mess.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My BCA experiences both the good and the gaps.

content.Placements: Around 70–75% of students placed in our BCA course. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, the lowest is 2.4 LPA, and the average package stands at around 3.6–4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Capgemini, and Zoho. About 60–65% of students receive internship opportunities through the college or external platforms. Companies offering internships vary across domains.
content.Infrastructure: Our BCA department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostels are decent, with basic facilities and average mess food. The canteen offers affordable snacks. Medical aid is available on campus, with a nearby hospital for emergencies. Sports facilities include both indoor games and outdoor fields. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory, with supportive faculty and improving amenities. It makes a good environment for learning and development.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharana Institute of Professional Studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. There are big grounds and the best canteen. The mess is also very good, and they give high priority to hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Quite good infrastructure and supportive faculty with a good scope of better placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are not that much up to date because sometimes they become of low range, which affects our placement drive assessment and virtual interviews. The facilities in other departments are also not that good because they never consider the students urgent matters.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for professional courses with decent placement support. Vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-stocked library, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel rooms are generally decent, with two students per room, and include basic facilities like a bed, table, and almirah. The college has a doctor's clinic on campus for basic medical aid. For sports, there are facilities for outdoor games like cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the popular colleges of Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very beautiful in this college. Hostel facilities are average. Wi-Fi does not work in hostel. For BBA students labs are not provided as much as we need. Hostel needs a lot of improvement. No proper management in hostel. We get sick after eating the food from our mess.

reviews.review_heading: My BCA experiences both the good and the gaps.
reviews.review_text: Our BCA department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostels are decent, with basic facilities and average mess food. The canteen offers affordable snacks. Medical aid is available on campus, with a nearby hospital for emergencies. Sports facilities include both indoor games and outdoor fields. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory, with supportive faculty and improving amenities. It makes a good environment for learning and development.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely average because of faculty, infrastructure, and placement package.
reviews.review_text: There are many departments in MPGI, and every department has the best facilities. In our college, there are two computer labs with fully air-conditioned atmosphere and a library with many types of books. In MPGI, both boys and girls have separate hostels, and both are in good condition. There is an Annapurna Grah for the mess and a hospital on campus for any emergency. There is a good ground with a cricket pitch and volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: MPGI attendance criteria is 90%. The college will charge a fine in case of short attendance.
reviews.review_text: Courses and hostel facilities are also good. My course fee in 2023 is approximately 1,80,000, and it includes everything in the college. Many courses are offered like B.Pharma, D.Pharma, BCA, B.Tech, MBA, MCA, Dental, and Ayurveda courses. They will charge scholarship processing fees as well as a fine for attendance below 90%.

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-rounded institution offering diverse programs from engineering to health sciences.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are non-AC. CS labs have full Wi-Fi and computer systems may require some maintenance. Labs are air-conditioned. The discipline is mandatory in the college. The quality of food is satisfactory but sometimes not tasty. Mess is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: There are good placement and internship opportunities for CSE students
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. Wi-Fi connectivity is good all over the campus. The size of the class is normal, with a capacity of 50 students in each class, and there are 10 sections in the CSE branch. The library and labs are well-maintained and easy to access. There are two hostels for girls and two for boys, and there is a common as mess and it is very clean, the quality of food is also very good. There is also a medical facility here.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life and the honest reviews about MPGI.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough and even better than other colleges. Classrooms are well-maintained, and the library is good, with an availability of books for every subject. You can easily find the latest edition of every book.

reviews.review_heading: Decent College with Helpful Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions, Kanpur has decent infrastructure, featuring multiple buildings dedicated to various departments. There are separate buildings for the Management Department, Engineering Department, Dental Department, etc. Classrooms are normal with a seating arrangement for 60 students, continuing with whiteboards, and there are no smart boards in classrooms. MPGI Library is a peaceful space with a wide range of books for study and reference. It’s well organized and ideal f...

reviews.review_heading: The campus life and the honest review about MPGI.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough and even better than other colleges. The classrooms are well-maintained, and the library is good enough, with a wide availability of books for every subject. You can also find the latest editions of the books.

reviews.review_heading: Not worth it for those who want only to study.
reviews.review_text: So, I will give it 4 stars for that because I like the infrastructure and facilities of the college; it is quite good, so a thumbs up from my side. I am a day scholar, so I really don't have any idea about the hostel, but one of my friends is a hosteler, so according to him, rooms are decent but the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Maharana, a glimpse of success.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available in the college campus as well as the hostel. Labs were well furnished with updated systems and were fully air-conditioned with proper seats and high computational systems with configured software. The library was well furnished, though not air-conditioned, but had a great set of books and an enriching environment where you can study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied. 70–80% of the faculty members are good. The staff is good.
reviews.review_text: Certainly, here is an overview of the faculty members for my course and hostel. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, ensuring connectivity for research online resources and project work labs well equipped with modern faculty for practical learning in subjects like computer science.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of the teachers, but the placements were good in 2019.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30% of the students got placed in various companies. Internships are provided by various companies like Keltron, Google, Infotech and SRV Tech. There is a placement cell in our college, and various campus drives are conducted by our college. Our college has IEDC and IQAC clubs. The placement cell comprises staff representatives from different departments, student representatives from the pre-final and final years of graduation, voluntary alumni representatives and supporting administrative staff members.
review_content.Infrastructure: Spacious labs and high-speed Wi-Fi are available. The hostel is situated near the college, and it is a 3-floor building with more than 300 rooms. The academic building is of 7 floors, and each floor has more than 10 rooms. On the ground floor, there are labs for mechanical, electrical and civil branches.

reviews_list.review_title: A good place to study CS.

review_content.Placements: I don't know exactly how many people have got placements till now. I haven't heard of anyone getting placed in any company in the last 3 years. At the time of admission, I heard a 2015 batch guy is working in a small company or something. As of now, I haven’t seen anyone get placed in this or that company that I know.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has Wi-Fi, but it’s slow. It is only accessible on systems in labs and is not available for students or teachers for their day-to-day use. The rest of the curriculum activities are there, all basic facilities are available in this college.

highlights.summary:

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer:
A:    Builders Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students get placed in various startups and get offers to be an intern. Some students get placed with the highest package of 18 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Global AI Solutions, VTS Enterprises, and SOTI.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Each classroom has Wi-Fi with high quality. Labs have a good environment associated with a good internet connection. We have a centralised library with complete AC facilities. In the hostel, each student can have a separate room facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good teachers are there in our college.

review_content.Placements: 75% students have been placed from our college. The lowest package is 2 L per annum and the highest is 5 L per annum. Wipro, Nissan, TLC, etc. are the top recruiters. Internship percentage is 50.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in our college. Food is also very nice. The canteen is average. Medical facilities are good in our college. First year, second year, third year and final year students get individual hostels.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They have good knowledge in all their subjects. They give us placement training in our campus. Semester exams are average. In last semester, the pass percentage was 75%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Enginnering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: If you need a job in your final year, I recommend Builders Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students were placed with the help of placement trainers in our college. TCS and Wipro were top-rated companies that hired more than 30 members of our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in comparatively nearby colleges. The ball courts were recently upgraded. Hostel food was below average. Laboratory and Wi-Fi facilities are available 24 hours. New elevators were implemented. That is convenient for students and staff.
review_content.Faculty: Staff members are experienced and knowledgeable. Staff members with more than ten years of experience work in all departments. A new ATRS college was opened on our campus. The syllabus could be changed for next year. It's too old nowadays. The old syllabus is very hard to understand. They also provide free classes for government exam preparation on Saturday and Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: Best of education in engineering.

reviews.review_text: The classrooms are big and very comfortable. Labs are big and well maintained, with all the required technologies. There are two grounds, one for football and the other for cricket. There's a separate volleyball court. The canteen is good and spacious. There's a separate games room with table tennis, carrom, chess, darts and pool table.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, good infrastructure, and the best-experienced faculty mem
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the college looks so beautiful. The entry gate of the college and the natural environment in the college are beautiful and amazing. They give a positive atmosphere to every student to relax their mind. There are classrooms, library room, computer room, laboratory room, playground, garden, workshop, activity oom, hall, conference room, meeting room, admin department, mineral water for drinking, canteen, sports and games, etc. These all facilities are...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, college infrastructure, surroundings and placements.
reviews.review_text: Different facilities provided by the college are amazing like Wi-Fi, computer labs, etc. They have a strong Wi-Fi connection and very useful labs with different kinds of machines and experimental parts. Classrooms were the best. There is a huge amount of books in the library for different courses and different branches. There was no hostel facility in our college. The quality of food available in the canteen was amazing and delicious. Medical facilities in case of emergency were also available h...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amiraj College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In my opinion, infrastructure is the plus point of our college. All the basic facilities like a library, canteen, workshops for all departments, etc., were available in the college. Along with that, a playground was also available to play some sports, and a volleyball court was available. The college has got a wide parking area.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty members are really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. No place on the campus is uncleaned. It's very clean and neat. The campus atmosphere is good for learning. It's a proper place for students to learn. One can have a peaceful and fresh mind here as the college premises are clean and good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, good placements, a really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no facility of hostel at Amiraj college of engineering and technology (ACET). But, infrastructure includes facility like Wi-Fi, well organised labs, comfortable classrooms with enough air circulation, an up-to-date library with the latest books, a quick first aid, and ground for outdoor sport and game zone for indoor sports like pool, TT, chess, Carrom etc.

reviews.review_heading: Best College in my life. Love to learn. Love to learn about career.
reviews.review_text: There are basically 2 floors. Infrastructure is very good and lush. There are greenery everywhere. Overall environment is very great. We face some issue during monsoon but it is okay. Each block has its own department and that is great other than any colleges.

reviews.review_heading: ACET college for bright future.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure don't need to tell anything you have to go there and should feel the surround of the college. I don't have words to express my feellings for infra. In the entrance there is a big compound they using it to play cricket. After entering the college a small square garden is available using it for prayer and at the rear side of college there is cafe and another small ground using It to play football, volleyball, kabbadi, kho-kho, etc. Sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with what I experienced in my time, great faculties, good atmosphere and great friends.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is far better than any other college near by. We got a great library with all required books of our stream. Labs are fully equipped with required instruments. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Only cons which I felt in college was drinking water, as there was time when shortage of water was real issue. Canteen was also not so good at that time, owners were changed every month, no regular menu. Apart from these college was good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amiraj College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There is great infrastructure. There is a separate block of each department, and there is also a facility of common area for boys and common area for girls. There is a huge ground near the college, and there is a lot of greenery. The environment is the best for those who really want to study.

reviews.review_heading: Improvement is needed. They can make it a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is not very good. This college is also still under construction for 4 years, and the roads here are also very bad. The canteen here is also very poor. Labs don't have many instruments available. Also, workshops here have fewer facilities and instruments. So much work is needed to be done in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure & facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is quite good with Wi-Fi connectivity (limited to some places). It has well-maintained labs, medical facilities and sports equipment. The quality of labs and classrooms is quite good. The quality of food available in the canteen is poor. There is no hostel. Overall, the college has good infrastructure & facilities.

reviews.review_heading: All faculty members are helpful.
reviews.review_text:
WiFi labs are there. There are more than 5 labs in each with more than 25 computers. Classrooms are great and big. In the class, there are good benches and comfortable chairs. In the library, you can get every type of books for engineering and books for GATE exams are also there.
There is a big ground where you play all sports, cricket, volleyball and many more games. The food in the canteen is of bad quality. There are no hostel rooms in the college. There is no problem as such with the infrast...

reviews.review_heading: One of the best memories and experiences of my life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is too good. Proper library and books in the library. Good environment. Proper practice room and washrooms. Proper guidance from the faculty and proper equipment for the study. Multi talent productive activities done throughout the year. All the activities organised properly and with full support from the management.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: School of Engineering and Technology Gurgaon Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is more than expected. Faculty members, infrastructure, hostel, and sports are amazing.

content.Placements: To be honest, the BCA in AI course at this university has been there for a long time, but students haven't enrolled in it until now. Our batch (2024-27) is the first to take this course at ASU. We don't have much exposure to M.Ch. placements, but since our course falls under the School of Engineering and Technology (SOET), there are good placement opportunities for B.Tech students.
content.Infrastructure: I must say our infrastructure. Since our course is technical, we are provided with very advanced labs, including Oracle labs, IOS labs, and hands-on practical digital labs. Our classrooms are air-conditioned, and we have a large library that contains all the latest academic books, novels, theses, and research corners. The entire campus has Wi-Fi connectivity. As I am the hostel president, I would say the best part of the hostel is the sports and games facilities, such as badminton courts, a basketball court, a cricket ground, and a volleyball court. The food is good, but the medical facilities could be better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering with Cloud Computing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: University for Future, which aims to provide future ready students .

content.Placements: In my course, 70%of students get placement from the college. The lowest package was 4 LPA. 80% of students get internships from my batch The placement head provides proper classes for resume building and personal growth and is very supportive and helpful.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good but not that much modern. The infrastructure needs to be upgraded. The labs are good and the internet connectivity is also good here. Wi-Fi is available The hostel is the best here with the best food and environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering with Cloud Computing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Apeejay stay university review .

content.Placements: Placements were very good here. 90% of the students got placed at my branch. I am a student pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering here. I got placed in CarDekho as an intern at CarDekho for the role Backed developed from here itself.
content.Infrastructure: The course was good, but not up to the current time period. But the faculty is very helpful here, which will teach you the chapters and also help out with the current scenario and situation here. Wi-Fi is available all the time with good-speed connectivity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering with Cloud Computing - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good opportunities for students to develop their skills.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. About 75% of students got internships. Many emerging technologies like AI, data science, data analytics and much more are introduced, which helps students to boost up their careers.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-maintained and have a good Wi-Fi connection in order to do our projects and assignments. As I'm a day scholar, I don't know much about the mess, but the food is good. Sports facilities are good. The canteen food is good. We have a good variety of junk food there, and the playground is big, where we have many sports like volleyball, football, sprints running etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering with Cloud Computing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A place to learn A place to glorify.

content.Placements: The placement cell of our college is actively participate in placement of the children of the college. Many reputed companies come in the college in select students for their reputed company. The company such as mahindra tech and Infosys take placements. The average salary package of our college is 5 Lacs per year.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food in the hostel is very good. They offer different foods daily made with guidence of chefs and with proper hygiene. The bedroom are cleaned on daily basis and property cleanliness and hygiene of the room are taken care. The hostel warden is also very supportive. They look after us in every matter.

paragraphs: The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum.
To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.
The average salary for PhD CSE scholars in the beginning is somewhere around INR 6 to 14 LPA.

So, as you move forward in your career journey and get some years of experience, the salary at mid-senior level positions is somewhere between INR 14 LPA and INR 20 LPA. For senior-level positions, the recruiters are ready to offer above INR 20 LPA because of the expanding scope of CSE. So, you must focus on improving your skills and gaining experience as much as possible.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Manjara Charitable Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Technology:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure of our college.

review_content.Placements: Mechanical branch is considered as the best branch but the trend changes. Students of our course did not get placed with more than 9 LPA, but the computer and IT branch students got placed with high salary packages in tech companies. The recruiting companies are Walwo, Infosys, TCS, and many tech and marine companies. Placement cell is helpful for students to get a job or become industry ready.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is situated near Versova, which is full of fish smell.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are good. All of them are Ph.D. holders, and most of them are from the 80s era. Students are getting less time to prepare for exams after the pandemic. Many of them are unable to complete the whole part of every module.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college for open caste students.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placements in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest salary package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and Infosys. Most of them got placed but few of them were not placed. Companies offered junior roles to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the canteen is great. Library provided is good. It is a raging-free campus. Wi-Fi is provided at a speed of 40 Mbps per device, which doesn't work well.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college start teaching 10 days before exams. Unit tests are conducted for the namesake. Teachers are doing great in teaching but students should not fully depend on them to prepare for semester exams. I suggest students utilise YouTube a week before exams.

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Bethlahem Institute of Engineering admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Bethlahem Institute of Engineering has an impressive review rating of 3.58 by 10 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Bethlahem Institute of Engineering?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bethlahem Institute of Engineering is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the Bethlahem Institute of Engineering programmes is around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

review_content.General: Our college provides labs, better classrooms and libraries. Our college provides a better hostel facility with tasty and quality foods than other colleges. They provide and grow up sports and games activities. The ragging is strictly restricted here, so don't afraid about it in our hostel. When you entered as a fresher in the 1st year, at that time, you will get fear from seniors. Then after your first semester, automatically you can become friends with seniors. This is my 4 years experience in the hostel. Moreover, you can get real happiness from hostel than college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good because best infrastructure and facilities, placement will be good, Everything will.

review_content.Placements: 1-80% of students were placed in my course. 2-the highest salary 1,00000, the lowest 20000 is offered. 4-Manger, ceo, site engineer roles offered in companies. 4-the lowest salary 10000, the highest 100000 was offered to our course. 5-100% of students got internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college provides good facilities and infrastructure, example full wi-fi campus and all labs will be applicable, big classrooms, very large library all books available. 2- good facilities available in the hostel and food is very good. Medical facilities available, sports and games available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college. The infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: About 40 to 50% of the students got placed. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 75,000 per month. TVS, Asus, etc., are the top recruiting companies. Top roles offered are quality engineer, production engineer etc. Almost 60 to 70% of the students from our course got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is good. Facilities like well-equipped labs with all required equipment in working conditions are available. There is a well-established library with all kinds of books related to our studies. Hostel facilities are good, and the food served is hygiene and healthy. They give importance to sports and games.

review_summary.college_name: Bethlahem Institute of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good Infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: About 80 percent of students are placed in college. The minimum salary package is 1 LPA to 2 LPA and the maximum is 3 LPA to 4.4 LPA. Mostly startup companies from Kanyakumari and top hardware companies from Chennai recruit on our campus. Around 70 percent of students got their internships in Technopark, Trivandrum. The skills in web development, UI/UX design, AI & ML, etc. are the roles offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has free Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are well-equipped with advanced systems, and each classroom has a smartboard. Our college library has more than 35,000 books, including both academic and other journals. Our college hostel is very eco-friendly, with neat and clean infrastructure. The food provided in the hostel is somewhat different from homemade food, with a medium taste. However, the mess and canteen are very neat and clean. We have a medical room and indoor and outdoor games in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college should give the importance of discipline than other activities.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed in various reputed companies. The average salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000-40,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Snapdeal, FinSurge, etc., visit our college for placements. About 30% of the students from our course got an internship in Snapdeal. Students can get placed in various top-most companies, and it has better scope in all technical fields.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides labs, better classrooms and libraries. Our college provides a better hostel facility with tasty and quality foods than other colleges. They provide and grow up sports and games activities. The ragging is strictly restricted here, so don't afraid about it in our hostel. When you entered as a fresher in the 1st year, at that time, you will get fear from seniors. Then after your first semester, automatically you can become friends with seniors. This is my 4 years experience in the hostel. Moreover, you can get real happiness from hostel than college.

content.Placements: Almost 65% of the students are placed. The salary packages offered are not yet been revealed. The salary packages offered to our course are very low. Almost 10 students got internships. A few friends got the job offer, and few are looking for themselves.

reviews.review_text: The campus is good. Facilities like well-equipped labs with all required equipment in working conditions are available. There is a well-established library with all kinds of books related to our studies. Hostel facilities are good, and the food served is hygiene and healthy. They give importance to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bethlahem Institute of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the amenities, and all the facilities are available to us. The college is very nice. The campus is very comfortable. All places like hostels and rooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Right place to do professional studies, echo friendly campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure looks like a green city. Laboratory are well-equipped with modern equipments. Hostel has the separate room facilities for boys and girls. The food provided in the mess are tasty and healthy. Separate sports team are available.

reviews.review_heading: College provide good campus facility but placements are not guaranteed.
reviews.review_text: Special blocks are available for various departments. Well-equipped lab facility is there, and it has good campus environment. It provides hostel, canteen, gym and sports facility. There are more than 50 college buses. An eco-friendly environment is provided on the campus. Computer labs and library are available with a collection of more than 50,000 books. It is a place for spiritual activities and also for a club activity.

reviews.review_heading: Iam dissatisfied only with the placement and other than that I liked and enjoyed the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus and the hostel is good compared to other colleges. The campus is always clean But I don't know about the food. The labs are well-equipped and the library has a wide range of books for every department. And we can use computer for browsing.

reviews.review_heading: Our college strictly follows its rules.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. There are all kinds of facilities related to academics. It has labs, classrooms, and a library. Our hostel provides all facilities, such as a mess, canteen, and medical services. They conduct sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-updated library and computer lab with a Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are very clean, and much space is available so that there won't be any congestion. Laboratories are well-equipped and updated. The hostel facility is very comfortable, and the canteen provides delicious and healthy food. Management also provides sports facilities to attend university level sports meet, and our team has won various prizes in university-level competitions.

reviews.review_heading: I have wasted my 4 years in this college. There are no good academics and college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and there are 2 blocks. Every block is sprawled over 3 floors. There is no huge campus, and our college has a hostel for boys and girls. There are two separate buildings, and one block is the main block which consists of all 1st-year students and other streams except for mechanical and civil. The other block is only for civil and mechanical students.

reviews.review_heading: An outlook by a 2017 passout.
reviews.review_text: The campus is decently large and is still expanding. There is a hall and a new open auditorium is being built. The mechanical labs are decent and the rest are not that great. There is a library but you can only find subject based books. The campus is said to be Wi-Fi enabled, but in reality it is a fake promise.

reviews.review_heading: Good engineer from a good college.
reviews.review_text: The campus has high teaching facilities, such as a well-equipped lab with all the required equipment, and a large library with many books. The hostel food is very neat and clean. It is also very hygienically prepared. There are many games provided in our college. There is a canteen with multiple snacks.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 695318 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 565873.

Jaykumar Rawal Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 0.61 and 57.4, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Civil, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 57.4. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Civil turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 57.4. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 13.59 in the General category under the HS quota.

review_summary.college_name: Sree Narayana Guru College of Engineering And Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and the facilities that they provide is good.

content.Placements: Around 50% of the students are getting placements. The highest package is around 3 to 4 LPA. Companies like telecommunication, etc., are providing recruitments. Around 80% of students are getting internships. Mainly, software developers are the roles given to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The college and hostel are nice. They provide computer labs, civil labs, mechanical labs, electrical labs, etc. The college provides one boys' hostel and one girls' hostel. And a canteen. The college has a department block and administration block. The quality of the building is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and has good faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are provided in our college by famous companies like TCS and Infosys. Every year, many students get placed in various MNCs. The chance of getting placed is high in our college. Students with backlogs are also getting placed with their skills in coding.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our college, like hostels, libraries, laboratories for various departments, a canteen, seminar halls, a projector room, and spacious classrooms. The quality of the hostels is very good. The hostel can accommodate up to 200 students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: To be honest, its a great college.

content.Placements: I am a civil engineering student. To be honest, the college placements are not that great but they are providing training and placement program for every final year for 7 days free. Previously, the placement was improving. Earlier, they provided a job fair in our college where 50 or more companies were included.
content.Infrastructure: College hostel is so neat and inside the college hostel we have lots of space. There is a ground where we can play cricket and other games. Canteen is good, they are charging considerably charges as a student so its good. The library is also great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good facility and a good class.

content.Placements: In the civil engineering course in my class, 20 students passed out before. 70% of the students are placed in jobs. They have good teaching, helping students improve, with good experience, and better scholarships.
content.Infrastructure: In the civil department, there are classrooms and Wi-Fi with a secure password. The library is digital, and the classroom has good facilities. The lab has good facilities, and the hostel has good facilities, but fewer students stay. Food is available in the canteen.
content.Faculty: Teachers have good behavior. They provide good teaching, and they will evaluate students weekly during exams. They will use flow charts for good and bad students and improve students’ performance. The semester exam is easy, but the KTU does not correctly value the paper during evaluation, which affects passing.

Additionally, candidates are also required to pay INR 1.32 Lacs as the hostel fees and INR 5,000 as one-time payment which includes caution deposit. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

admission_process.title: Mangalayatan University Jabalpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mangalayatan University admissionis granted based on merit or scores obtained inMUEE(University-based entrance test) / Any National / State Entrance Examination. The University offers 45 courses in 10 streams and 11 specialisations at UG and PG. The duration of UG courses is three years and for PG courses it is two years, whereas diploma programmes can long up to three years. The application form ofMangalayatan Universityis available online on the official website of the university. It offers full-time courses in the streams of Engineering, Business Administration, Computer Applications, Law, Agriculture, Science, Arts, and Commerce at UG and PG levels.

Mangalaytan University accepts CUET-UG, CUET-PG, MUEE, etc. for admission. Some popular courses offered by the Mangalayatan University, Jabalpur along with their eligibility criteria & fee details are listed below:
Course Name

Mangalayatan University, Jabalpur admissions are based on entrance exam. Below are the steps to get a seat in Mangalyatan University:
STEP 1: MU Application Process 2025

Mangalyatan University admission process starts with filling the application process in online mode for the respective courses. Candidates who are interested in getting admission to any of the UG & PG courses at MU can apply on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
Mangalyatan University shortlists candidates for admission based on MUJEE or any other state or national-level entrance exam. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

The shortlisted candidates will be notified about the selection via call, email, or post. Aspirants must pay the fee and submit the relevant documents within the stipulated deadline to confirm their admission.
For more information about Mangalayatan University,Jabalpur Admission process check out the below video:

faqs.question: Who can apply for BSc at Mangalayatan University Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: Those who want to get admission to BSc course at Mangalayatan University Jabalpur must pass Class 12 in the respective subjects. This is a mandatory step to qualify for before applying for this course.To know more about the BSc admission, click here.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for BSc at Mangalayatan University Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: Admission to BSc at Mangalayatan University Jabalpur is entrance-based. Those who are willing to get admission to this course must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step is to qualify for MUEE exam, which is an in-house entrance exam of the university. Students also have to appear for Personal Interview (PI) round.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at Mangalayatan University Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to MBA at Mangalayatan University Jabalpur, students need to pass graduation with 50% aggregate in the respective subjects from a recognised university. The admission is based on MUJEE, which is an in-house entrance exam of the university itself. Aspirants can also apply through a valid score of any state-level entrance exam. The final selection is based on the performance of candidates in the Personal Interview (PI) round.

faqs.question: What is Mangalayatan University Jabalpur BSc application fees?
faqs.answer: Mangalayatan University Jabalpur BSc application fee is INR 500 which can be paid through Debit card, Credit card and, Internet Banking or if the online payment of application fee is unsuccessful, then a DD of INR 500 can also be drawn in the favour of the University. If applying through the offline mode, then a Demand Draft of INR 500 can be enclosed in the favour of the University.

paragraphs: Mangalayatan University Jabalpur has a dedicated placement cell that offers placement assistance to eligible students. According to data available in the official website, the curriculum of the courses offered by Mangalayatan University Jabalpur is made career-ready. Further, the placement cell of the University guides students to get 100% placement assistance . The top recruiters of Mangalayatan University Jabalpur in recent past included leading companies such as Adama, Syngenta and BASF.

faqs.question: What are the various job profiles at which MA students can find work?
faqs.answer: After MA course completion, the graduates can find relevant jobs in their field as per chosen specialisation. Whether a graduate chooses to work or study further, the scope of MA Education courses in India is fairly broad. MA graduates can work as Linguist, Correspondent, Lecturer, Writer, Teacher, Broadcast Journalist, Researcher etc. They can earn an average salary ranging from INR 4 LPA to 6 LPA . However, the package depends upon the candidates' skill and the employer.

faqs.question: What are the career options after MA in Political Science from Mangalayatan University Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: After successfully pursuing your MA in Political Science from Mangalayatan University Jabalpur, candidates can take up career options such as Social Media, Reporting, Writing, Public Relations, etc. After earning a degree in MA Political Science, candidates can begin their political career as a politician/ political analyst/ political advisor. For young applicants, the Indian Civil Services is the most prominent and respected employment option. Read More : MA Career Scope

Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in CBSE 12th and UP 12th. To complete the Neelam College of Engineering and Technology admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Neelam College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Neelam College of Engineering and Technology is approximately INR 57500 - INR 140000.

description: Neelam College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Neelam College of Engineering and Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:
A few more updates are given below:

The Neelam College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Neelam College of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 1181156 and 1281466 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in El

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 1181156 for the general AI quota.
On the contrary, the least competitive specialisation for admission in 2024 was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with closing cutoff rank of .

Neelam College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Neelam College of Engineering and Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Neelam College of Engineering and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Neelam College of Engineering and Technology.

As the Neelam College of Engineering and Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Neelam College of Engineering and Technology.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the closing ranks of 2111651, 2118237 and 2120997, respectively.

For admission to Neelam College of Engineering and Technology for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Neelam College of Engineering and Technology.
